title: Pseudopodospermum undulatum
taxonomy: Pseudopodospermum undulatum is classified in the family Cucurbitaceae, which is a family of flowering plants commonly known as the gourd or cucumber family. It is placed in the genus Pseudopodospermum, which is a genus of flowering plants. Within the Cucurbitaceae family, Pseudopodospermum undulatum is a member of the order Cucurbitales. The order Cucurbitales is part of the larger group called the superorder Rosanae.
